claims.text: Social tone is euphoric/FOMO: a wall of 'can't lose / 100x incoming' posts on StockTwits and Nitter - a crowded, late-stage long worth fading
Two credible non-spam sources corroborate the euphoria, not a single viral post; Telegram pump-channel froth discounted

rationale: Crowd at a euphoric extreme across StockTwits, Nitter and Reddit (Telegram shill froth discounted); contrarian-bearish as a late, crowded long, held below 0.7 since there is no capitulation washout to confirm exhaustion yet.
